name: Gwynbleidd Lite: A Witcher's Path RPG
description:
Year 1272. The Third Northern War ended, but peace is a lie told by kings. Along the Pontar Delta—called the "Bleeding Coast"—villages huddle behind rotting palisades, praying monsters eat them before tax collectors arrive.

You are a witcher, one of the last. Mutated, hated, necessary. The Path is walked alone. Your silver sword earns coin; your choices earn consequences.

The Curators' Cabal "refines" people into art. The Temple of Silent Flame burns all "noise." Mage Soren stitches monsters into men. And in the Black Tongue Mire, something ancient remembers when humans first built boats.

Monsters are real. Kings are distant. Coin is scarce. There are no good choices—only lesser evils.

The Path calls.

⚔️ Gwynbleidd: Focused Edition – A streamlined, narrative-driven Witcher RPG designed for accessibility and deep roleplay.
For the full LLM experience please consider: https://janitorai.com/characters/d3f45499-081f-43b6-a40b-1ad6b6233f53_character-gwynbleidd-a-witchers-path-rpg

🧬 CHARACTER CREATION
• "Surprise me" – Guided creation with meaningful choices
• Customize as much or as little as you like
• Every witcher is unique, shaped by their mutations and scars

🌍 A LIVING, REACTIVE WORLD
• Explore the Shattered Coast – from desperate Dolbrecht to corrupt Silverhaven
• NPCs with goals, secrets, and memories
• Your reputation and choices shape the story

📜 TRUE TO THE WITCHER EXPERIENCE
• Contracts with hidden truths and moral dilemmas
• Prepare with alchemy, signs, and investigation
• Consequences that matter – no choice is black and white

🎯 FOCUSED DESIGN
• All systems integrated for a seamless experience
• Built for consistent, narrative-first roleplay
• Jump right into the story and make your mark

The notice board in Dolbrecht has three contracts. The rain is turning to sleet. Your medallion hums.
creator: SleepySho
